name: operational hold cleared through thread progress

source.purpose: A cleared operational hold persists through thread gates/progress while the same operational fact is rejected as a clue.

thread_spine.title: Clear the Forty-Thousand Hold
thread_spine.resolutionCriteria: The hold is cleared when Voss processes the release and the clamp releases.
thread_spine.failureMode: The ship remains clamped and misses the departure window.

resolutionGates.label: Release processed
resolutionGates.condition: Voss processes the release and the clamp visibly releases.

narrator.prose: Voss slots the release chip. The port-fee hold clears, the clamp indicator flips green, and the docking arm unlocks from the hull.

progress.summary: Voss processed the release chip; the port-fee hold cleared and the docking clamp unlocked.

updates.sourceQuote: The port-fee hold clears, the clamp indicator flips green, and the docking arm unlocks from the hull.

payload.content: Voss cleared the port-fee hold and the docking clamp unlocked.
